mnemonics: Zero-One Matrices: Rent Out One Chair
keyPoints: Reflexive: Contains all pairs of identical elements in the domain and codomain.
Transitive: If (a,b) and (b,c) are in the relation, then (a,c) is also in the relation.
Antisymmetric: If (a,b) and (b,a) are in the relation, then a = b.
Partial Order: Hasse Diagram: A Small Tree
Equivalence Relation: Part: Divide And Conquer
